name: erinacines
summary: Cyathane diterpenoids from lion's mane mycelium studied for nerve growth factor and neurotrophic signaling.
description: Erinacines are lion’s mane mycelium diterpenoids studied for NGF/BDNF-linked neurotrophic signaling, relevant to neurite outgrowth pathways in preclinical models.
safetyNotes: A systematic review of erinacines evaluated cellular and animal models, while human safety reports concern whole Hericium erinaceus preparations. Whole-mushroom stomach discomfort, headache, or allergy reports cannot define isolated-erinacine risk; pregnancy, breastfeeding, liver, kidney, surgery, and interaction safety remain insufficient.
